message:
fix(clippy): resolve all pedantic clippy warnings in frankenterm-core (ft-159qj)

Fix 67 clippy warnings across 22 source files:
- derive_partial_eq_without_eq: add Eq to 5 config/stats structs
- manual_midpoint/suboptimal_flops: use f64::midpoint() and mul_add()
- question_mark: replace if-none-return with ? operator
- unnested_or_patterns: collapse match arms
- bool_to_int_with_if: use usize::from(bool)/i64::from(bool)
- should_implement_trait: allow on from_str() methods
- iter_not_returning_iterator/iter_without_into_iter: allow annotations
- only_used_in_recursion: allow on recursive parameters
- assign_op_pattern: use += for assign operations
- trait_duplication_in_bounds: remove redundant Serialize bounds
- clone_from: use clone_from() instead of = x.clone()
- incompatible_msrv: allow floor_char_boundary on MSRV 1.85
- needless_range_loop: allow on performance-critical pointer wiring
- negate instead of multiply by -1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
